task_description: Build a full-featured Bumble account maker automation panel - a React SPA with dark theme (purple/pink), featuring proxy input, Facebook/Gmail login credentials, SMS API integration, image upload, name generator, bio writer with AI rewrite, token output display, and start/stop automation with mock simulation logic.

verification.summary: npm run build succeeds cleanly (tsc + vite build). Production bundle: 315KB JS (100KB gzip), 22KB CSS (4.6KB gzip). All 8 UI sections implemented with dark theme, animations, toast notifications. Mock automation logic works end-to-end.
